completed_tasks.name: SharePoint architecture and implementation skeleton
completed_tasks.progress: Added infra sharepoint client seam, refactored feature service to use client, extended CLI commands, and wired client selection in bootstrap. Fixed download destination directory resolution to use sharepoint_downloads_dir when no explicit destination is provided. All 19 focused workflow/CLI tests pass, 7 broader foundation/output tests pass, compile check passes.

remaining_tasks.name: Tests, verification, docs summary, and graph rebuild

human_actions_pending.action: Provide real SharePoint tenant credentials and run live auth rehearsal later
human_actions_pending.context: Live path uses m365 CLI + tenant values and cannot be fully validated in CI.

decisions.decision: Keep SharePointService as feature boundary and move provider logic into infra adapters.
decisions.rationale: Preserves feature-first architecture and testability while adding live tenant support.

decisions.decision: Preserve file-backed mode as default fallback when site_url/tenant_id are absent.
decisions.rationale: Maintains deterministic offline behavior and existing test compatibility.

decisions.decision: Extend existing sharepoint CLI group with list and exact-file download options.
decisions.rationale: Matches legacy operator workflow without introducing a separate command family.

next_action: Rebuild graphify using scripts/rebuild-graphify.sh (if it exists) or `python3 -m graphify .` from /home/brewuser/work/py-hbs-ads
context_notes: Phase 7 testing complete: all 19 focused workflow/CLI tests pass, all 7 foundation/output tests pass, all code compiles cleanly. Fixed download destination directory resolution. Ready for graph rebuild and final documentation.
